steps.title: Use the location goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the location of the Isthmus of Mansheya. The relevant notes say it is in Egypt and connects the island of Pharos to mainland Alexandria.

steps.title: Keep only location facts
steps.content: Choice A only identifies the isthmus as an example. Choice B defines an isthmus generally without locating this one. Choice D describes what an isthmus does but omits where the Isthmus of Mansheya is. The remaining choice gives both Egypt and the Alexandria connection. The answer is C.
